private async Task<Guid?> GetQueueIdByNameAsync(
    string queueName,
    CancellationToken cancellationToken)
{
    if (string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(queueName))
    {
        return null;
    }

    var query = new QueryExpression("queue")
    {
        ColumnSet = new ColumnSet("queueid", "name")
    };

    query.Criteria.AddCondition(
        "name",
        ConditionOperator.Equal,
        queueName);

    var result = await _dataverseRepo.RetrieveMultipleAsync(
        query,
        cancellationToken);

    var queue = result.Entities.FirstOrDefault();

    if (queue == null)
    {
        return null;
    }

    return queue.Id;
}
----------------------
Guid? senderQueueId = await GetQueueIdByNameAsync(
    senderQueueName,
    cancellationToken);

if (!senderQueueId.HasValue)
{
    _logger.LogWarning(
        "DIA notification email creation skipped because sender queue was not found. LogId: {LogId}, SenderQueueName: {SenderQueueName}.",
        logId,
        senderQueueName);

    return;
}

Add sender queue resolution for DIA exception notification
